package rulecoverage

func PositivePrometheusHighCardinalityLabels() string {
    ruleID := "prometheus_high_cardinality_labels"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`counter.WithLabelValues(userId)` or `histogram.WithLabelValues(requestPath)` where label values appear to come from user IDs, request paths, or other high-cardinality sources"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
